title: Freshly Fragrant Turkish Chicken Drumsticks Manti
description: A light and herbal Turkish dish featuring chicken drumsticks, perfect for a brunch mood, with a twist of tempering chocolate for added flavor, high in protein for a friendly meal option
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped parsley, and chopped dill.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat with the herbal mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and toss again to coat.
Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
Melt the tempering chocolate and brush it over the chicken drumsticks.
Wrap each chicken drumstick in a piece of phyllo dough, brushing the edges with water to seal.
Place the manti on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Serve the manti hot, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
